description:
Requests a best-effort predicted next prompt for one loaded thread.

This is an internal interactive-client helper. The request does not advance the thread or persist a new item; it asks the server to sample from the thread's current prompt-visible history.

cancel.description:
When true, cancel the request identified by `cancellation_token` without sampling.

This requires `cancellation_token`.

cancellationToken.description:
Optional client token used to cancel an older in-flight suggestion request.

Reusing a token cancels the older request before this request samples.

threadId.description: Thread whose current completed history should be used for prediction.

title: ThreadSuggestNextPromptParams
